section_name: Defense to Prosecution of Certain Offenses
text: It is a defense to prosecution of an offense involving the operation of a motor vehicle and relating to the placement of a license plate or the display of a registration insignia that the vehicle was operated in compliance with rules issued under this subchapter governing the placement of a digital license plate or the display of a registration insignia on a digital license plate, as applicable.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.157 — Defense to Prosecution of Certain Offenses

It is a defense to prosecution of an offense involving the operation of a motor vehicle and relating to the placement of a license plate or the display of a registration insignia that the vehicle was operated in compliance with rules issued under this subchapter governing the placement of a digital license plate or the display of a registration insignia on a digital license plate, as applicable.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 594 (S.B.604), Sec. 3.01, eff. September 1, 2019.*
